economic_notes: Tsal'alh has investments in Tsal'alh Development Corporation (TDC) and Tsal'alh Development Limited Partnership (TDLP) accounted for under modified equity method. TDC subsidiaries include TDC-IVL Contracting Ltd., TDC Contract Management Corp., Sisxets Property Management Corp., Crane's Landing RV Park Corp., Lil'Tem' Mountain Hotel Corp., and various limited partnerships. Also holds investments in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership and BCFN GRS Inc.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to exclusion of complete budgeted information, which is a departure from Canadian public sector accounting standards. Tsal'alh consolidates Tsal'alhmec Holding Corp. as a subsidiary. TDC and TDLP are accounted for under the modified equity method. TDC has significant negative equity of -$6,308,446 and net loss of -$646,164 for the year ended December 31, 2021. expenses_housing combines Band Owned Housing ($192,614) and CMHC Housing ($381,632). Capital lease obligations fully repaid in 2022 ($7,244). Audit report signed November 17, 2025, which is over 3 years after the fiscal year end.
